subject: History
description: Full K-12 History curriculum with interactive scenario-driven lessons

lessons.title: Ancient Egypt Tomb Raider
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are an archaeologist who just discovered a hidden tomb. Collect hieroglyphs and answer history questions to unlock its secrets.

lessons.title: Revolutionary Decisions
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a printer in Boston, 1773. The British are coming — your choices shape the revolution.

lessons.title: Medieval Kingdom Builder
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a newly crowned king/queen. Make feudal decisions that affect your kingdom's prosperity.

lessons.title: Renaissance Workshop
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are an artist apprentice in Leonardo's workshop. Complete commissions to earn your master's seal.

lessons.title: Industrial Revolution Factory
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a factory owner in 1850. Balance worker welfare with profit to survive the Industrial Revolution.

lessons.title: World War Correspondent
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a war correspondent. Your dispatches shape how people understand the conflict.

lessons.title: Civil Rights Marcher
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a young activist in 1963. Your decisions influence the march's outcome and safety.

lessons.title: Cold War Spy
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a spy during the Cuban Missile Crisis. Gather intelligence and make choices that prevent — or start — a war.

lessons.title: Modern Global Leader
lessons.subject: History
lessons.storyHook: You are a newly elected world leader. Navigate 2024 geopolitical tensions through historical lens.
